subject: DevOps
title: The Shared Responsibility Model
description: A 60-second lesson on The Shared Responsibility Model.

hook.text: A firm stored unencrypted data in S3, then blamed AWS for the leak. AWS replied: that's your job.

buildup.text: Providers secure the infrastructure: physical sites, hypervisors, and network hardware.

discovery.text: Customers secure what they deploy: data encryption, access policies, OS patches, and app security.

twist.text: The split changes by service. IaaS: you do most. PaaS: shared. SaaS: provider does most.

climax.text: Most cloud breaches stem from customer misconfiguration, not provider failures. Know the line.

punchline.text: The cloud guards the building. You guard what's inside.

quiz.question: In the shared responsibility model, what is the customer responsible for?
options: Data encryption, access policies, and application security
Physical data center security and hardware maintenance
